description: §60.2/§60.9 — an endpoint naming an HTTP method outside the recognized set (here `HEAD`) fires E-API-METHOD-INVALID (parse-time, W2). The recognized set is GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE (§60.2 http-method).
rationale: §60.2: `http-method` SHALL be one of GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE. A value outside that set (HEAD) is E-API-METHOD-INVALID (parse-time, W2). base= is present, the response is a variant, and ${id} binds to UserQuery.id, so only the method code fires.
